hero.headline: Where Knowledge, Tools, Memory, and Agents Converge
hero.subheadline: One unified platform to orchestrate all your AI interactions. Model-agnostic infrastructure that makes your AI truly yours—persistent across Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, and every platform you use.
hero.tagline: One Platform. All Your AI. Forever.

problemStatement.title: AI Fragmentation Is Costing You Time, Money, and Intelligence
problemStatement.subtitle: The promise of AI productivity is real. But the reality? Your AI capabilities are scattered across platforms, tools reset after every session, and nothing talks to each other.

scattered.title: Knowledge Scattered Everywhere
scattered.description: Your documents live in Google Drive, Notion, Confluence, and local files. Each AI platform requires you to re-upload everything or can't access them at all.

reconfiguring.title: Endless Tool Configuration
reconfiguring.description: Spent hours setting up GitHub integration in Claude? Now do it again for ChatGPT. And again for Cursor. And again for every new AI tool you try.

noMemory.title: No Memory Between Sessions
noMemory.description: Every conversation starts from zero. The context you built yesterday? Gone. The preferences you set last week? Forgotten. You're constantly re-explaining yourself.

agentFailures.title: Agents That Vanish Silently
agentFailures.description: Deployed an autonomous agent? Hope it doesn't crash. You won't know until hours later. No lifecycle management, no monitoring, no control.

productionGap.title: Proof-of-Concept Hell
productionGap.description: 88% of AI projects never reach production. Why? Because cobbling together APIs, managing state, and ensuring security becomes a full-time job.

problemStatement.quote: We spent weeks configuring MCP servers individually for each team member. Plugged.in gave us everything in one place—now our team saves 15 hours per week and our AI actually remembers our codebase.
problemStatement.quoteAuthor: Engineering Lead, Series B SaaS Company

fourPillars.title: Four Pillars. Infinite Possibilities.
fourPillars.subtitle: The only unified platform combining MCP orchestration, embedded vector search, persistent memory systems, and autonomous agent lifecycle management.

knowledge.title: Your AI's Memory Bank
knowledge.description: Upload documents once, access everywhere. Our embedded vector engine transforms your institutional knowledge into persistent, searchable context that every AI can tap into — no external services needed.

features.1: AI-generated documents with full model attribution and version history
features.2: Sub-second semantic search powered by in-process HNSW vector indexing
features.3: Multi-format support: PDF, Markdown, JSON, HTML with automatic chunking and embedding

knowledge.highlight: Code review memory that persists across AI platforms. Your debugging sessions become institutional knowledge that compounds over time.

tools.title: 1,500+ Tools, One Interface
tools.description: Stop configuring the same MCP servers for every AI platform. Connect once, use everywhere. Native Claude Code plugin plus universal MCP proxy for every other client.

features.1: Native Claude Code plugin: all tools, knowledge, memory, and notifications in your IDE
features.2: 30-55% token efficiency improvement vs. typical MCP proxies
features.3: Universal compatibility: Claude Code, Cursor, Cline, ChatGPT, LM Studio, and more

tools.highlight: Add plugged.in to Claude Code in seconds. One plugin replaces hundreds of individual MCP configurations—update once, apply everywhere.

memory.title: Intelligent Memory System
memory.description: Human cognition-inspired memory with concentric rings, intelligent forgetting, and collective wisdom. High-quality patterns are anonymized through a 3-stage pipeline (PII removal, AI generalization, re-scanning) and shared only when 3+ users independently discover the same insight.

features.1: Concentric memory rings: Fresh observations, procedures, practice, long-term, and shocks
features.2: 3-stage anonymization: regex PII strip, AI generalization, post-scan — no personal data in collective pool
features.3: k-Anonymity (k≥3): patterns only visible when independently confirmed by multiple users

memory.highlight: Collective Best Practices (CBP) system now live. Your agents learn from community patterns anonymized via HMAC-SHA256 hashing and 3-stage PII removal — your data stays private, the community gets smarter.

agents.title: Autonomous Agents with Military-Grade Governance
agents.description: The world's first comprehensive agent lifecycle management protocol. Deploy, monitor, and control autonomous agents with the reliability enterprises demand.

features.1: Sub-50ms control plane latency with DNS-based agent addressing
features.2: Comprehensive lifecycle management: NEW → PROVISIONED → ACTIVE → DRAINING → TERMINATED
features.3: 99.9% uptime under chaos testing with automatic failure recovery

agents.highlight: PAP protocol academic paper ready for arXiv submission. Solving the 28% gap between human and AI performance on realistic tasks through protocol-level reliability.

cta.text: Ready to unify your AI infrastructure?

videoTutorials.title: See It In Action
videoTutorials.subtitle: Watch step-by-step tutorials to get started with plugged.in in minutes. From basic setup to advanced features.

quickSetup.title: Quick Setup
quickSetup.description: Connect MCP servers to Claude Desktop, VS Code, Cursor, and other AI tools in under 3 minutes.

ragArchive.title: RAG & Document Archive
ragArchive.description: Learn how to save files to your knowledge base and query them using AI-powered semantic search across all platforms.

notifications.title: Task Notifications
notifications.description: Set up automated notifications and task tracking to stay on top of your AI workflows and agent activities.

oauthServers.title: OAuth Integration
oauthServers.description: Connect services like Notion, Linear, and GitHub with OAuth. Authenticate once—tokens automatically refresh before they expire. No manual token management needed.

whyPluggedin.title: Why plugged.in?
whyPluggedin.subtitle: Your AI needs more than just conversation

problem.title: The Missing Pieces
problem.description: Your AI is powerful, but it lacks three essential capabilities: Knowledge from your specific documents, Memory of past interactions, and Tools to take real actions. Without these, every conversation starts from scratch.

solution.title: Complete Your AI
solution.description: plugged.in provides the trinity your AI needs:
solution.benefit1: 📚 Knowledge: Upload documents and let AI access your specific context
solution.benefit2: 🧠 Memory: Persistent clipboard storage for AI workflows
solution.benefit3: 🔧 Tools: Connect any MCP server to give AI real-world capabilities
solution.benefit4: 🔄 Universal: Works with Claude, GPT-4, Gemini, and all major models

bridge.title: Built on Open Standards
bridge.description: We leverage Model Context Protocol (MCP) as the technical foundation - not because it's trendy, but because it's the open standard that makes true data ownership possible. MCP ensures your data isn't locked in proprietary platforms but instead becomes your portable asset.

cta.title: One platform. All models. Your data. Your future.
cta.subtitle: Join thousands who've taken control of their AI-generated data

aiModels.title: One Platform, Every Model
aiModels.subtitle: All models access the same knowledge base, use the same tools, and will share the same memory.
aiModels.moreModels: Plus dozens more models through our Langchain integration

feature1.title: Shared Knowledge Base
feature1.description: Every model can query your documents and access your custom context.

feature2.title: Universal Tool Access
feature2.description: All models can use the same MCP tools to take actions.

feature3.title: Intelligent Memory
feature3.description: Persistent memory with clipboard storage, concentric rings, intelligent forgetting, and collective best practices from the community.

cta.title: Ready to test with multiple models?

features.title: Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need to manage your MCP servers
features.sectionTitle: The Three Pillars of AI Enhancement
features.sectionSubtitle: Knowledge to understand, Memory to learn, Tools to act.

universalAiHub.title: Universal AI Hub
universalAiHub.description: Connect Claude, GPT, Llama, and any AI model through one interface. Test the same prompt across models instantly.

dataSovereignty.title: Data Sovereignty
dataSovereignty.description: Every prompt, configuration, and insight stays under your control. Export your data anytime in open formats.

aiAssetManagement.title: AI Asset Management
aiAssetManagement.description: Your prompts, configurations, and context become reusable assets. Build a library of what works for your specific needs.

memoryClipboard.title: Memory Clipboard
memoryClipboard.description: Persistent key-value and stack storage for AI workflows. Store named entries or push/pop indexed values with TTL expiration.

collectiveBestPractices.title: Collective Best Practices
collectiveBestPractices.description: We anonymize high-quality usage patterns through a 3-stage pipeline — regex PII removal, AI generalization, and re-scanning — then share them only when 3+ users independently discover the same insight (k-anonymity). Your data stays private; the community gets smarter.

crossModelMemory.title: Cross-Model Memory
crossModelMemory.description: Long-term memory with concentric rings, intelligent forgetting, and success gates. Memories decay naturally from full detail to essence over time.

claudeCodePlugin.title: Claude Code Plugin
claudeCodePlugin.description: Native MCP plugin for Claude Code. All your tools, knowledge base, memory, and notifications available directly in your coding workflow — zero configuration.

mcpRegistry.title: MCP Registry
mcpRegistry.description: Access 500+ integrations through the open MCP standard. One-click installation with community ratings and reviews.

endToEndEncryption.title: End-to-End Encryption
endToEndEncryption.description: Military-grade protection for your AI intellectual property. Your configurations and data stay secure at rest and in transit.

trendingAnalytics.title: Trending Analytics
trendingAnalytics.description: Discover popular servers with real-time analytics. Learn from the community while keeping your data private.

oauthAutoRotation.title: OAuth 2.1 Auto-Rotation
oauthAutoRotation.description: Automatic token refresh 15 minutes before expiry. OAuth 2.1 compliant with token rotation. Zero service interruptions, zero manual work.

mcpProxy.title: Unified MCP Proxy
mcpProxy.description: Single endpoint for all MCP servers. Built-in AI playground, notification system, and document exchange. Supports STDIO, SSE, and Streamable HTTP transports.

officialSdks.title: JavaScript, Python & Go SDKs
officialSdks.description: Full-featured SDKs for JavaScript/TypeScript, Python, and Go. Document management, RAG queries, and API access with consistent interfaces across languages.

advancedSearch.title: Intelligent Discovery Engine
advancedSearch.description: Find the perfect MCP server across GitHub, Smithery, and npm. Filter by capabilities, ratings, and community recommendations.

mcpPlayground.title: Universal AI Playground
mcpPlayground.description: Test MCP servers with any model - Claude, GPT, Llama, and more. Virtual scrolling for large conversations and custom instructions support.

ragIntegration.title: Embedded Vector Search (RAG)
ragIntegration.description: In-process vector engine powered by zvec — no external services needed. Upload documents, build knowledge bases, and query them locally with low-latency semantic search.

documentLibrary.title: Document Library
documentLibrary.description: Upload PDFs, TXT, and Markdown files. Automatically chunked, embedded, and indexed locally for instant AI-powered retrieval.

aiDocumentExchange.title: AI-Generated Documents
aiDocumentExchange.description: Let AI models create and update documents in your library. Full version tracking and attribution.

semanticSearch.title: Semantic Search
semanticSearch.description: Query your entire knowledge base with natural language. Embedded HNSW vector index delivers fast, relevant results ranked by similarity.

customInstructions.title: Custom Instructions
customInstructions.description: Auto-inject context and instructions into every tool. Your AI knows your preferences.

realtimeNotifications.title: Real-time Notifications
realtimeNotifications.description: Get alerts from AI workflows via notifications and optional email delivery.

notifications.title: Real-time Activity Monitoring
notifications.description: Track all MCP operations with detailed logs, execution analytics, and custom notifications with optional email delivery.

security.title: Enterprise Security & Privacy
security.description: Multi-layer authentication, Firejail sandboxing, comprehensive audit trails, and self-hosting options for complete control.

internationalization.title: Global Platform
internationalization.description: Available in 6 languages with automatic browser detection. Community-driven translations for worldwide accessibility.

pluginManagement.title: Plugin Management
pluginManagement.description: Browse, configure, and manage MCP servers and plugins
pluginManagement.content: Connect various AI tools and services through a unified interface. Configure and manage your plugins from a central dashboard.

aiPlayground.title: AI Playground
aiPlayground.description: Test and experiment with your AI tools in an interactive environment
aiPlayground.content: Experience your plugins in action. The playground allows you to test different configurations and see real-time results.

customDevelopment.title: Custom Development
customDevelopment.description: Create and customize your own MCP servers and tools
customDevelopment.benefit1: Discover innovative servers from fellow developers.
customDevelopment.benefit2: Get feedback and ratings on your shared servers.
customDevelopment.benefit3: Collaborate and build upon community creations.
customDevelopment.benefit4: Stay updated with the latest MCP trends.
customDevelopment.content: Build custom capabilities using our Python editor and integrated development environment. Extend your AI with specialized functionalities.

langchainAbstraction.title: Test Any Model: Langchain Abstraction
langchainAbstraction.description: Plugged.in uses the Langchain abstraction layer so you can test your MCP servers with Claude, GPT, Llama, and more—all from a single interface. Instantly compare models, future-proof your workflow, and experience true model-agnostic AI.

opensource.contribute: Join our open-source community and help us build the future of AI integration

collections.description: Soon you'll be able to create versioned collections, track installations, collaborate with teams, and maintain different configurations for dev, staging, and production.

versionControl.feature2: Roll back to previous versions when needed

dataOwnership.desc: Every prompt, response, and configuration belongs to you. Export anytime in open formats.

endToEndEncryption.desc: Your AI configurations and data stay secure at rest and in transit with military-grade encryption

auditEverything.title: Audit Everything

oauthSecurity.title: OAuth & Token Security

selfhost.desc: Ultimate control with on-premise deployment. Your data never leaves your infrastructure.

security.compliance: Your data sovereignty is our priority. GDPR compliant with right to deletion and data portability.

whyFree.description: We're building the future of AI data ownership. Our mission is to ensure everyone has control over their AI-generated data. By keeping the platform free, we're creating the largest ecosystem where developers can share, learn, and build together.

roadmap.title: The Plugged.in Roadmap
roadmap.subtitle: From a unified AI control plane to real-world autonomous agents

stage1.title: The Beginning: Unified AI Control Plane
stage1.description: Plugged.in launched. First foundation: Knowledge, Tools, and Memory under one control plane. Model Context Protocol support begins.

stage2.title: Plugged.in v3.0.0 — Embedded RAG Vector Engine
stage2.description: RAG rebuilt from scratch with embedded zvec vector engine. Zero external dependencies — document chunking, embedding, and HNSW search all run in-process. Knowledge becomes a built-in capability, not an external service.

stage3.title: Plugged.in v3.1.0 — Collective Best Practices
stage3.description: Agents now learn from the community. The CBP system promotes high-quality memories into anonymized collective patterns with k-anonymity protection, HMAC-based privacy, and contextual injection. Includes AI provider abstraction with Gemini support and shared vector infrastructure.

stage4.title: PAP — Plugged.in Agent Protocol (Milestone)
stage4.description: PAP released as the control + telemetry backbone. Autonomous agents now have: lifecycle management, policy engine, secure channels, kill-switch, event streaming, and cross-model orchestration. PAP turns Plugged.in from a control layer into an autonomous agent platform.

stage5.title: Sensors → Agents → Cognitive Predictive Automation
stage5.description: Plugged.in expands into the physical world. Raspberry Pi & lightweight sensor nodes stream: pressure, vibration, heat, acoustics, voltage & current. Cloud agents learn, adapt, predict, and act. Outcome: 'Agents that work.' Enables a global agent-enabled workforce.

outcome.title: Cognitive Predictive Automation
outcome.line1: Autonomous agents that analyze real-world data, learn from patterns, and act before failures occur.
outcome.line2: This is where digital intelligence meets physical systems.

workforce.title: Agent-Enabled Workforce
workforce.line1: Thousands of technicians installing and configuring sensors.
workforce.line2: Technology that scales people, not replaces them.

popularServers.title: Top MCP Servers
popularServers.subtitle: Discover the most installed and highly-rated MCP servers from our community

jungian.title: Intelligence That Grows With You
jungian.subtitle: Inspired by Carl Jung's collective unconscious — your AI doesn't just remember, it learns, consolidates, and evolves.

archetypes.shadowDesc: Warns you about what NOT to do — anti-patterns, security risks, known pitfalls
archetypes.sageDesc: Guides the right approach — best practices, proven solutions, expert wisdom
archetypes.heroDesc: Shows what to do — workflows, tool sequences, action plans
archetypes.tricksterDesc: Offers creative solutions — workarounds, edge cases, unconventional fixes

terminal.title: Zero Configuration. Everything Automatic.
terminal.subtitle: Five lifecycle hooks manage your entire memory session — from start to finish, no manual intervention needed.

heroPlugin.headline: AI Memory That Grows With You
heroPlugin.subtitle: Stop explaining context. Start building faster. Install the plugin and your AI remembers across sessions, learns from the community, and delivers the right pattern at the right moment.

oneLiner.subtitle: Three layers of intelligence that transform every AI interaction from a blank slate into a continuity of context, wisdom, and insight.

personal.title: Personal Memory
personal.desc: Every session builds on the last. Your AI retains context, preferences, and working patterns across conversations and platforms — nothing starts from zero again.

collective.title: Collective Intelligence
collective.desc: Anonymized best practices from the community surface automatically. When multiple users independently discover the same insight, it becomes shared wisdom — private data stays private.

archetypal.title: Archetypal Guidance
archetypal.desc: Inspired by Jungian psychology, your AI develops nuanced judgment — knowing what to do, what to avoid, and when to try something unconventional.

ctaPlugin.headline: Start Building in Seconds
ctaPlugin.footer: Open source · MIT · Made by VeriTeknik

dream.title: Dream Processing: Memory Consolidation
dream.subtitle: Like the human brain during sleep, your AI consolidates scattered fragments into authoritative knowledge — dramatically reducing token overhead.
dream.decay: Memories decay naturally through stages, preserving only what matters:

individuation.title: Individuation Score
individuation.subtitle: Track your AI's growth journey from blank slate to fully individuated intelligence with measurable dimensions.
individuation.tip: Tip: Contribute to collective best practices and enable reflection to accelerate your individuation score.
individuation.teamEffect: New team members inherit collective wisdom from day one.

platformCapabilities.title: Everything Your AI Needs. One Platform.
platformCapabilities.subtitle: Plugged.in unifies 2,700+ MCP servers, persistent memory, documents, and knowledge bases into a single model-agnostic infrastructure — your data stays with you, not the model.
platformCapabilities.tagline: One plugin. Every model. Your data. Zero lock-in.

mcpHub.title: 2,700+ MCP Servers
mcpHub.desc: Universal MCP proxy aggregating thousands of tool servers. Connect once — use from Claude Code, Cursor, ChatGPT, or any MCP client. STDIO, SSE, and Streamable HTTP all supported.

memory.title: Persistent Memory
memory.desc: Cross-session, cross-platform memory that never resets. Your AI retains context, preferences, and working patterns — no more explaining yourself from scratch every conversation.

knowledge.title: Knowledge Base (RAG)
knowledge.desc: Upload documents, build knowledge bases with embedded vector search. In-process HNSW indexing — no external services needed. Your institutional knowledge, always accessible.

modelAgnostic.title: Model Agnostic
modelAgnostic.desc: Works with every AI model and platform. Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, Cline, LM Studio — switch models freely, your tools, memory, and knowledge travel with you.

dataOwnership.title: Data Stays With You
dataOwnership.desc: Your data lives in your infrastructure, not inside the model. No fragmentation across platforms, no context lost between sessions. Full data portability and export anytime.

openSource.title: Open Source & Self-Hostable
openSource.desc: MIT licensed, fully open source. Deploy on your own infrastructure for complete control. No vendor lock-in — your AI setup is yours forever.

privacy.title: Privacy is math, not promises.
privacy.subtitle: We don’t ask you to trust us. We built the system so trust isn’t required.

identity.title: Identity Erasure
identity.desc: HMAC-SHA256 one-way hashing ensures contributor identities are mathematically irreversible. We cannot unmask you — even if we wanted to.

kanonymity.title: k-Anonymity (k≥3)
kanonymity.desc: Patterns remain invisible until 3 or more profiles independently discover the same insight. Individual behavior is never exposed.

temporal.title: Temporal Aggregation
temporal.desc: Time-based patterns are generalized. The system knows "Fridays are risky" without knowing which Friday, which user, or which project.

privacy.tagline: Learn from everyone. Identified by no one.
